tool.name: WebAtlas Write
tool.description: AnnData and images into SpatialData Zarr
tool.command: #if $input_anndata.ext =="h5ad": cp $input_anndata input.h5ad && #end if #if $input_raw_img ln -s $input_raw_img raw_img.tif && #end if #if $input_label_img ln -s $input_label_img label_img.tif && #end if write_spatialdata.py #if $input_anndata.ext =="zarr": --anndata_path '$input_anndata.extra_files_path/$input_anndata.metadata.store_root' #else --anndata_path input.h5ad #end if --stem $stem #if $input_raw_img --raw_img_path raw_img.tif #end if #if $input_label_img --label_img_path label_img.tif #end if && zip -r $stem-spatialdata.zarr.zip $stem-spatialdata.zarr && mv $stem-spatialdata.zarr.zip $output_zarr

param.name: input_anndata
param.label: AnnData input
param.help: AnnData input to include in the SpatialData Zarr. Can be H5AD or AnnData Zarr.

param.name: input_raw_img
param.label: Raw image TIFF
param.help: Optional raw TIFF image to include in the SpatialData Zarr.

param.name: input_label_img
param.label: Label image TIFF
param.help: Optional label TIFF image to include in the SpatialData Zarr.

tool.help:
This tool converts spatial omics data into a SpatialData object and exports it as a Zarr dataset.
----
**Inputs**
- **AnnData** (H5AD or Zarr) - **Label image (TIFF)** *(optional)* - **Raw image (TIFF)** *(optional)*
Image inputs can be provided independently or omitted entirely.
----
**Functionality**
The tool constructs a SpatialData object from the provided inputs:
- The AnnData object is stored as a **table element** - The label image is stored as a **labels element** - The raw image is stored as an **image element**
To ensure compatibility with the SpatialData format, the observation index of the AnnData object is adjusted. A new integer-based index *webatlas_index* is introduced while preserving the original observation index as *original_obs_index*.
The resulting SpatialData object is written to Zarr format.
----
**Output**
- **SpatialData object (Zarr, ZIP-compressed)**
----
**Use Case**
This SpatialData object enables unified storage and handling of different types of spatial omics data (e.g. AnnData, label images, raw images) in a single data structure. It can be used in other tools or workflows that support SpatialData in Zarr format.
SpatialData objects are not utilized by the WebAtlas pipeline itself.
